description: Prowlarr control service - manages the Prowlarr server process

services.name: com.prowlarr.app.service
services.description: Downloads, starts, stops and monitors the Prowlarr server

commands.name: start
commands.description: Start Prowlarr (downloads it on first run)

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update Prowlarr to the latest release

commands.name: getLogs
commands.description: Return the tail of the Prowlarr log
